content:
Chapter 1: The Beginning

This document uses h4 for chapter headings, which is unconventional but valid HTML5 sectioning.

The current parser only recognizes h1-h3 as section breaks; h4 is silently treated as body text.

Chapter 2: The Middle

If the parser is fixed to handle h1-h6, this becomes a second section.

Otherwise everything flattens into one long stream.

Chapter 3: The End

Three chapters total. The eval harness expects 3 sections after Phase 4 fixes.
